3133420.name: Oaths Against the Darkness
3133420.description:
They came from the seas. Long ships, affixed with hideous totems which hurt the eyes to look at. They brought destruction, hedonism, and pain to our sacred Land. At times, ominous whispers spoken from a thousand lips herald their coming. Other times, wails of the forsaken can be heard for miles. They threaten our Kingdom, our God, and our very way of life. They must be defeated.

In this medieval turn-based RPG set in a fantasy world based on 9th century England, lead your warband of honorable warriors to victory against the Nightmare Vikings.

  • Fight in tactical battles against Thralls, Warriors, Berserkers, and foes darker still.

  • Swear oaths of honor, which must be upheld in order to succeed in battle.

  • Upgrade and progress your troops with equipment, stat boosts, and perks.

Oaths Against the Darkness is designed to be a simple tactics game that doesn't take a ton of brain power to pick up and play, but can still offer deep tactical gameplay. 

If you'd like to interact with me and give feedback, there's a link to a discord I'll be using throughout the next few months!
